excerpt: The official programme page for Master of Clinical Pharmacy lists Local applicants opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-05-31. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline For non-local applicants: 31 March 2026 For local applicants: 31 May 2026
